characters.name: Abby Day
characters.description: Abby DayBornAbigail DayNickname(s)AbbyFromPortland, ORRelationshipsFamilyJess Day(sister)Bob Day(father)Joan Day(mother)RomancesSchmidt(ex-boyfriend)BackstagePortrayed byLinda CardelliniSeason(s)3First seenLast seenSisterSister IIIEpisodes3Abby Dayis a guest star onSeason 3of the FOX comedyNew Girl. She is portrayed byLinda Cardellini. Abby is Jess' older sister, who, according to Jess, has never quite found her footing in life and always seems to be drifting. Abby sees her life as an endless party and adventure. In many ways, Jess envies her for her spontaneous nature. Even though Abby sometimes feels like she's aimlessly adrift. When Abby gets arrested at a hotel in San Diego, Jess comes to her rescue. For this and many other reasons, Jess is determined to keep Nick from meeting Abby. When Jess and Abby start to spend the day together, she isn't too thrilled by her sister's antics. Though she hasn't openly admitted it, Jess subtly hints at her embarrassment over Abby's behavior. Despite this, Jess recognizes that Abby needs help and allows her to stay in her room until she can "get on her feet." When Schmidt meets Abby, they start a flirtatious relationship. By the end of "Sister III," Abby leaves the loft and returns to Oregon to live with their mother. Abby is Jess' older sister, who, according to Jess, has never quite found her footing in life and always seems to be drifting. Abby sees her life as an endless party and adventure. In many ways, Jess envies her for her spontaneous nature. Even though Abby sometimes feels like she's aimlessly adrift.

characters.name: Aly Nelson
characters.description: Aly NelsonBornAly NelsonOccupationDetective at LAPDRelationshipsFamilyDanBill (son)Leslie Nelson(sister)3 Unnamed sons (flash forward)Unnamed daughter (flash forward)RomancesWinston Bishop(husband)Tripp (ex-boyfriend)BackstagePortrayed byNasim PedradSeason(s)4,5,6,7First seenLast seenSharkEngram PatterskyEpisodes28 Aly Nelsonis a recurring character on the FOX comedyNew Girl. She is portrayed byNasim Pedrad. Initially she is no nonsense, direct, and attempts to avoid any sort of relationship with her partner Winston Bishop outside of her duty as a police officer with the LAPD. Eventually, Winston wins her over as a friend and they form a tight bond both as partners and as friends, and eventually, enter in a relationship together and get married. characters.name: Amanda
characters.description: AmandaAppearanceGenderFemaleHairBrownEyesHazelCharacterPortrayed byLake BellFirst seenNaked(only appearance)  Amandais a bartender who worked at Clyde's withNick, early inseason one. After his breakup withCaroline, Nick musters up the courage to ask Amanda out, even though he often finds her so ironic that he can't tell when she's kidding. Her relationship with Nick is extremely short-lived because he can't get over the giggle-scream made by Jess when she accidentally walks in on him, dancing naked in his bedroom to Jamaican music.

characters.name: Andy
characters.description: Andyis a character who appears inKatie. Jess is immediately attracted to Andy and asks Nick to give him her phone number. However, Nick gives her number to Andy's friend, Bearclaw.

characters.description: BearclawBioBornn/aNickname(s)BearclawJobDelivery manMaritalSingleAppearanceGenderMaleHairDark brownEyesDark brownRelationshipsRomancesJess Day(mistaken short date)CharacterPortrayed byJosh GadSeason(s)2,3,4First seenKatieLast seenWalk of ShameEpisodes3 Bearclawis a recurring character on FOX comedyNew Girl. He is portrayed by Josh Gad. Bearclaw works with Andy making bar deliveries and Nick finds him hilarious. His real name is unknown.

characters.name: Becky Cavatappi
characters.description: Becky CavatappiBornRebecca CavatappiNickname(s)Sloppy Boob LizardOccupationPrincipal at Coolidge Middle SchoolBackstagePortrayed byElizabeth Berkley LaurenSeason(s)Season 5Only seenThe ApartmentEpisodes1Becky Cavatappiis the principal of Coolidge Middle School in the FOX comedyNew Girl. She is portrayed byElizabeth Berkley Lauren. Becky Cavatappi first and only appears in the episodeThe Apartment. She is relocated to Coolidge and takes over the role afterPrincipal Fosterbroke his hip inJury Duty. She is hated byJessbecause of her irresponsibility and laziness. In The Apartment, she gives Jess a binder with a weeks full of work that she has to complete by the next day. Whlist atCece's apartment and helping her pack, they lose the binder. Eventually, Cece calls Becky saying Jess quits. Jess is angry at Cece but after handing the binder to Cavatappi, she realizes she can do better and quits. Becky is never seen again. characters.name: Bob Day
characters.description: Bob DayBornRobert DayRelationshipsFamilyAbby Day(daughter)Jess Day(daughter)RomancesAshley Berkman(ex-wife)Joan Day(ex-wife)BackstagePortrayed byRob ReinerSeason(s)2,3,4,6,7First seenLast seen"Parents""The Curse of the Pirate Bride"Episodes11Bob Dayis a recurring character onNew Girl. He is portrayed byRob Reiner. Bob is the father of Jess and Abby Day. He was married to their mother,Joan Day, however they are now divorced. He was married to Ashley Berkman, a former sex addict, and an old classmate of Jess. Bob tends to be very protective over his daughter, especially when it comes to her dating. He has a habit of scaring away any boy she is interested in. When he shows up unexpected the day before Cece's wedding, he is stuck spending the day with Nick, who had just slept with Jess. Nick at first doesn't want to touch the subjuct of dating, however finds a way to talk about his feelings for Jess referring to her as Yolonda Winston. He reveals to Bob that Yolanda is actually Jess, to which Bob reacts by chasing him and screaming "I'm going to kill you!" He feels that Nick is alot like himself, and the reason why he doesn't accept Nick is that he 'isn't good enough for his daughter. Bob is the father of Jess and Abby Day. characters.name: Bonnie Miller
characters.description: Bonnie MillerRelationshipsFamilyNick Miller(son)Jamie Miller(son)RomancesWalt Miller† (husband)BackstagePortrayed byMargo MartindaleOnly seenChicagoBonnie Milleris a guest character onNew Girl. She is portrayed byMargo Martindale. Bonnie is the mother ofNickand wife of the lateWalt Miller. During Walt's funeral and the days of preparation inChicago, she meets Jess for the first time and did not like her very much. However, after Jess helped make the funeral lighter for everyone, Bonnie began to like Jess and even told Nick how happy she was that she had someone like Jess to look after him. Bonnie is the mother ofNickand wife of the lateWalt Miller. During Walt's funeral and the days of preparation inChicago, she meets Jess for the first time and did not like her very much. characters.name: Brianna
characters.description: BriannaOccupationStudentRelationshipsFamilyGreta (mother)Karen (mother)BackstagePortrayed byJoey KingSeason(s)1Only seenBullyEpisodes1Briannais a character in the TV showNew Girl. She is played byJoey King. Karen (mother) Brianna is an intelligent, snobby and rude know-it-all who is inJess' class inSeason 1. In the episode 'Bully', Brianna is very judgemental towards Jess' way of teaching. As revenge, Jess breaks Brianna's robot hand project; causing it to malfunction and spark during the science fair. After Brianna's mothers Greta & Karen discover their daughters project was sabotaged, Jess immediately owns up for her mistake. Greta and Karen demand for her to be fired, but the principalTanya Lamontagneseems unbothered and let's Jess of the hook. characters.description: CarolineBioBirthday1979JobParty organizerAppearanceGenderFemaleHairBlondeEyesBlueRelationshipsRomancesNick Miller(ex-boyfriend)CharacterPortrayed byMary Elizabeth EllisSeason(s)1,3First seenPilotLast seenExesEpisodes6 Carolineis a recurring character on FOX comedyNew Girl. She is portrayed by Mary Elizabeth Ellis Nick thought he was madly in love with her and was crushed after their break-up. In the events prior to the pilot, he often got drunk and called her with an English accent professing his love for her. The couple had been broken up for six months when Jess came along.

characters.name: Cece Parekh
characters.description: Cece ParekhBornCecilia ParekhBirthday23 October 1982Nickname(s)CeceFromPortland, OROccupationOwner and Manager at Cece's Boys Model ManagementBartender atClyde's Bar / The Griffin(former)Model (former)RelationshipsFamilyRuth Parekh-Schmidt(daughter)Moses  (Son Flash forward)Priyanka Parekh(mother)Mr. Parekh † (father)Uncle Pardeep (uncle)RomancesSchmidt(husband)Buster(ex-boyfriend)Coach(fling)Shivrang(ex-fiancé)Robby McFerrin(ex-boyfriend)Kyle(fling)Gavin(fling)Reagan Lucas(fling)Mick Jagger (one night stand)FriendsJess Day(best friend)Winston BishopNick MillerCoachAly NelsonNadiaSadieBackstagePortrayed byHannah SimoneYoung CeceAriela BarerJaidan JironSeason(s)1,2,3,4,5,6,7First seenLast seenPilotEngram PatterskyEpisodes140Cece Parekhis a main character on FOX comedyNew Girl. She is portrayed byHannah Simone. Cece and Schmidt have two kids: a daughter namedRuth, and a son named Moses. Cece is an L.A.-based former professional model, now bartender, and also the best friend ofJess Day. She has also become the on-off love interest ofSchmidt. She is loving and protective of Jess, but blunt, and gives good dating advice. Her father died when she was twelve, and her relationship with her mother was strained in her teens, as both were headstrong. Her parents are of Indian descent, but Cece was born in Portland, Oregon. She enjoys going to clubs and dancing, but she eats healthy and exercises to maintain her appearance. After deciding she was too old to be a model, she started bartending atThe Griffin. She also decided to get her GED. Cece is a drop dead gorgeous and sexy young Indian American woman of medium height and slim but toned and curvy figure. She has light tan skin, almond shaped dark brown eyes, slim but long nose, full pink lips with some red lipstick and long straight thick full voluminous dark brown hair with bangs that reaches below her chest and sometimes its wavy. She usually wears dark but gorgeous and elegant clothes with dresses, colorful shirts, jeans and high heels. She’s tall standing at 5’7. Cece is an L.A.-based former professional model, now bartender, and also the best friend ofJess Day. She has also become the on-off love interest ofSchmidt. She is loving and protective of Jess, but blunt, and gives good dating advice. Her father died when she was twelve, and her relationship with her mother was strained in her teens, as both were headstrong. Her parents are of Indian descent, but Cece was born in Portland, Oregon. She enjoys going to clubs and dancing, but she eats healthy and exercises to maintain her appearance. After deciding she was too old to be a model, she started bartending atThe Griffin. She also decided to get her GED.

characters.name: Coach
characters.description: Ernie TagliabooBirthdayJune 17[1]Nickname(s)CoachOccupationPersonal TrainerHealth Teacher/Sports coach at Coolidge (Former)RelationshipsFamilyThree SistersNieceRomancesMay Esperas(girlfriend)Cece Parekh(fling)Pepper (fling)Malia (ex-girlfriend)FriendsWinston BishopSchmidtNick MillerJess DayCece ParekhBackstagePortrayed byDamon Wayans Jr.Young CoachMakhari ElamSeason(s)1,3,4,5,6,7First seenLast seenPilotWhere the Road GoesEpisodes44Ernie Tagliaboo,[1]known by his friends asCoach, is a supporting character on FOX comedyNew Girl. He is portrayed byDamon Wayans Jr. Health Teacher/Sports coach at Coolidge (Former) Niece Coach is a roommate who returned to theloftin 2013 after leaving 2 years prior. He lived withNick,Schmidt, and Jess until deciding to move out when he got a serious girlfriend, Malia, after whichWinstonmoved in, who had just returned from playing basketball abroad. However, now that he has broken up with his ex-girlfriend, and Schmidt has decided to rent the apartment across the hall on his own, Coach has moved back in with the gang. Coach is a former athlete who now works as a personal trainer, and he doesn't know how to talk to women.

characters.name: Daisy
characters.description: DaisyAppearanceGenderfemaleCharacterPortrayed byBrenda SongFirst seenCoolerLast seenNerd Daisywas the former romantic interest forWinston Bishop. It was undetermined whether or not they are an official couple. Their relationship ended when Daisy admitted to already being involved with someone else. She is portrayed byBrenda Song. Daisy and Winston met at the bar after the guys were kicked out of a dance club. Winston found himself nervous around girls, and after a failed attempt at hitting onHollyhe walked away in defeat. He ended up sitting next to Daisy, which she commented on how embarassing that was for him. He started to choke up again, but she quickly flashed an engagement ring and told him to relax.

characters.name: Dirk
characters.description: DirkBioMaritalDivorcedAppearanceGenderMaleCharacterPortrayed byMartin StarrFirst seenFancyman (Part 2)Last seenFancyman (Part 2) Dirkis Nick's roommate from law school. He is a degree collector, and the smartest guy Nick knows. Dirk is introduced when Jess walks in on him at the urinal "Tony the Tiger style." He went to law school with Nick, and has a tendency to stay in college and accumulate multiple master degrees.

characters.name: Dirk

characters.name: Eduardo
characters.description: EduardoAppearanceGenderMaleHairBlackEyesBrownCharacterPortrayed byJosiah BarajasFirst seenCece Crashes(only appearance) Eduardowent to middle school withJessandCece. He spoke broken English and had a crush on Jess, but she assumed that he only liked Cece, because most boys they went to school with did. In a flashback, Eduardo gives preteen Jess a homemade Valentine with her name written on it in gold glitter, which she thinks is meant for Cece because all the boys like her. "Jess!" Eduardo insists, which Jess mistakes for the word 'yes.' She says she'll give the Valentine to Cece, and Eduardo is insistent. "No -Jess!" he cries, and when she verifies that it's not meant for Cece, he responds in Spanish - "Si! Si!" - which only confuses Jess more. Realizing that he's getting nowehere, he takes off down the hallway in tears, with Jess holding the Valentine and still totallly oblivious.

characters.name: Elaine
characters.description: ElaineBioMaritalPresumably married (toShivrang)AppearanceGenderFemaleHairBlondeRelationshipsRomancesShivrang(love of her life)CharacterPortrayed byTaylor SwiftSeason(s)2Only seenElaine's Big Day Elaineis a guest character onSeason 2of FOX comedyNew Girl. She is portrayed byTaylor Swift. Elaine is the long time love ofShivrang. She was a guest at his wedding to Cece, and ran away to elope with him after it was called off. She is portrayed by Taylor Swift.

characters.name: Elizabeth
characters.description: ElizabethBioMaritalSingleAppearanceGenderFemaleHairLight BrownEyesHazelRelationshipsRomancesSchmidt(ex-boyfriend)CharacterPortrayed byMerritt WeverSeason(s)2,3First seenBachelorette PartyLast seenDouble DateEpisodes7 Elizabethis a recurring character onNew Girl. She is portrayed by Merritt Wever. Elizabeth isSchmidt's former girlfriend from college. They dated for four years, and broke up due to Schmidt's change in behavior after his weight loss. Schmidt came to see her years later, wanting her to be his date to Cece's wedding. Initially she refuses, however later he comes to see her again with pizza, and to help him be nice again she tells him to eat the pizza. They then begin dating, although Schmidt is initially embarrassed about her being his girlfriend, but he decides he does like her.

characters.name: Elvin
characters.description: ElvinFromLos AngelesRelationshipsFamilyGina(mother)FriendsWinston BishopBackstagePortrayed byBlake GarrettSeason(s)Season 1First seenLast seenThe 23rdNormalEpisodes3Elvinis a guest character onSeason 1of FOX comedyNew Girl. He is portrayed by Blake Garrett. Elvin is the son ofGina, head of Schmidt's company. He is introverted and incredibly bright and discerning for his age. He takes an affinity to Winston, who is subsequently employed by Gina to become Elvin's nanny. Elvin is the son ofGina, head of Schmidt's company.
